verse1.lyrics: Paint no illusion, try to click with what you got
Taste every potion as if you like yourself a lot
Go let it out, go let it in, go let it out (Pick up the Bass)

verse2.lyrics: Life is precocious in the most peculiar way
Sister psychosis don't got a lot to say
She go let it out, she go let it in, she go let it out
She go let it out, she go let it in, she go let it out

chorus.lyrics: Is it any wonder why princes and kings
Are clowns that caper in their sawdust rings
Ordinary people that are like you and me
We're the keepers of our destiny
We're the keepers of our destiny

verse3.lyrics: I'm gonna live in the city, I'm gonna drive in out of town
And you're coming with me, the right time is always now
So go let it out, so go let it in, so go let it out
So go let it out, so go let it in, and go let it out

post-chorus.lyrics: We're the builders of their destiny  x4

bridge.lyrics: So go let it out, go let it in,
Go let it out, don't let it in,
And go let it out, don't let it in
And go let it out, don't let it in, don't let it in, don't let in, don't let in
